name: Secret Neighbor Beta
short_description: Beta Runs Aug 2-19! A group of kids tries to sneak into their creepy Neighbor's basement to rescue their missing friend. The only problem is one of the players is a traitor in disguise. Yes, you can play as the Neighbor.
detailed_description:
This is an ALPHA version of Hello Neighbor Multiplayer Game, Secret Neighbor.

Secret Neighbor is a Multiplayer Social Horror game set in the Hello Neighbor universe.

A group of kids tries to sneak into their creepy Neighbor's basement to rescue their missing friend. The only problem is one of the players is a traitor in disguise.

Playing as a child:
  • Collect keys
  • Save you friends from the Neighbor
  • Cooperate but don`t trust anyone

If you are lucky enough to play as Neighbor
  • The house is your territory! Use it to separate, scare and confuse intruders.
  • Use your gadgets to get advantage over the kids' team.
  • Gain trust amongst your foes and attack in the right moment.
  • Protect your basement!
